title: Route wiring duplicated between main.go and the test's setupRoutes
evidence: main.go:21-44 builds the mux inline; integration_test.go:473-498 defines a parallel setupRoutes that the tests use instead. main()'s own routing is never exercised.
suggestion: Extract a single setupRoutes(handler) into main.go and call it from both main() and the tests so drift is impossible.

title: main() and server startup are untested (coverage 63.6%)
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.636; main.go:10-56 (DB init, ListenAndServe) has no test coverage.
suggestion: Optional: factor startup into a testable run() function; acceptable to leave main() untested for a CRUD service.

title: ?author= filter uses exact equality, not partial/case-insensitive match
evidence: database.go:86 uses WHERE author = ?; TestListBooksFilterByAuthor:117 confirms exact-match semantics.
suggestion: Spec only requires a filter; exact match satisfies R3. Consider LIKE if partial matching is desired.
